title: Shocking New AI Just Hit 12 Million Tokens With 1000x Less Compute
summary: Subquadratic released SubQ, a model that processes 12 million tokens using sparse attention (SSA) with 1000x lower compute than prior long-context approaches. The company claims this enables direct reasoning over full codebases, contracts, and documents without the retrieval and chunking overhead currently required in enterprise AI.
